# K2SO

> K2SO is an AI workspace for orchestrating CLI agents, reviewing documents, and managing terminals — all in a ~5MB Tauri + Rust desktop app.

## Overview

K2SO is a lightweight desktop application built with Tauri v2 and Rust. It provides a unified workspace for running and managing AI coding agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini, Copilot, Aider, and more). It includes a built-in code editor, persistent terminals, active agent detection, and multi-project support designed for agencies and teams.

## Key Features

- Multi-agent orchestration: run multiple CLI LLM agents in parallel
- Built-in AI assistant powered by local Qwen2.5-1.5B model
- Code editor with terminal persistence
- Branch-per-client workflow for agencies
- Active agent detection across terminals
- ~5MB binary, open source (MIT)

## K2SO Companion

K2SO Companion is a mobile app (iOS/Android) that connects to your K2SO workspace remotely. It lets you monitor running agents, chat with LLM sessions, and approve agent work reviews from your phone. Built with Tauri v2 + Rust. No cloud service required — connects via ngrok with username/password authentication.

## Links
